command: cd services/local-agent; uv run --python 3.13 python scripts/smoke_gemma_e2b_report.py
report_summary: Ran terminal command: uv run --python 3.13 pytest tests/test_local_report_runtime.py
limitations: This is a tiny local smoke test, not a quality benchmark.
It proves the existing localhost Ollama report adapter can return an evidence-cited report from the installed Gemma E2B tag under a bounded smoke budget.
It does not make models required for recording, timeline review, exports, CI, or normal tests.
It does not prove Gemma E4B, Qwen, PaddleOCR, or faster-whisper runtime behavior.
